title: meconella oregana subsp. californica
intro: Meconella oregana subsp. californica, also known as California fleabane or California meconella, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Meconella oregana subsp. californica can be used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves to take advantage of its health benefits.
